# Big Data Projects L2

> Execute a big-data analysis project — data preparation and wrangling, feature selection and engineering, model training, and performance evaluation for structured and unstructured data

**Category:** Trading · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** quant · big-data · data-wrangling · feature-engineering · model-training · cfa-level-2

## What this does

Execute a big-data analysis project — data preparation and wrangling, feature selection and engineering, model training, and performance evaluation for structured and unstructured data

Specifies 2 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **project_id** *(text, required)* — Project identifier
- **data_type** *(select, required)* — structured | unstructured

## What must be true

- **project_steps → conceptualisation:** Define problem and target variable
- **project_steps → data_collection:** Identify sources, ingest
- **project_steps → preparation_wrangling:** Clean, transform, integrate
- **project_steps → exploration:** EDA, feature selection, feature engineering
- **project_steps → model_training:** Method selection, performance evaluation, tuning
- **project_steps → results_interpretation:** Communicate insights to stakeholders
- **structured_data_prep → cleansing:** Handle missing, invalid, duplicate, inconsistent observations
- **structured_data_prep → wrangling:** Extract, aggregate, filter, normalise/standardise
- **unstructured_text_prep → cleansing:** Remove HTML tags, punctuation, numbers; case normalisation
- **unstructured_text_prep → wrangling:** Tokenisation, stemming, lemmatisation, stop-word removal, n-gram creation
- **unstructured_text_prep → representation:** Bag-of-words, TF-IDF, word embeddings
- **feature_selection → purpose:** Reduce dimensionality, remove noise, prevent overfitting
- **feature_selection → methods:** Filter (chi-sq, correlation), wrapper (forward/backward), embedded (Lasso)
- **feature_engineering → transformations:** Log, square, polynomial, interactions
- **feature_engineering → one_hot_encoding:** Convert categorical to binary indicator columns
- **model_training → method_selection:** Match algorithm to problem (regression vs classification, linear vs non-linear)
- **model_training → performance_metrics:** Accuracy, precision, recall, F1, AUC for classification; RMSE, MAE for regression
- **model_training → confusion_matrix:** TP/FP/TN/FN tabulation
- **model_training → tuning:** Grid search or random search with cross-validation
- **validation → project_required:** project_id present
- **validation → valid_data_type:** data_type in [structured, unstructured]

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Execute Project** — when project_id exists; data_type in ["structured","unstructured"], then call service; emit bigdata.project_executed. _Why: Execute big-data analysis project._

**❌ Failure paths**

- **Invalid Data Type** — when data_type not_in ["structured","unstructured"], then emit bigdata.project_rejected. _Why: Unsupported data type._ *(error: `BIGDATA_INVALID_DATA_TYPE`)*

## Errors it can return

- `BIGDATA_INVALID_DATA_TYPE` — data_type must be structured or unstructured

## Events

**`bigdata.project_executed`**
  Payload: `project_id`, `data_type`, `model_score`, `feature_count`

**`bigdata.project_rejected`**
  Payload: `project_id`, `reason_code`

## Connects to

- **big-data-characteristics** *(required)*
- **machine-learning-l2** *(required)*

## Quality fitness 🟢 87/100

Automated quality score measuring outcome coverage, rule structure, error binding, and field validation depth. Regenerated by `npm run fitness` — see [`scripts/fitness.js`](../../scripts/fitness.js) for the scoring model.

| Dimension | Score | Points |
|-----------|-------|--------|
| Description | `██████████` | 10/10 |
| Rules | `██████████` | 10/10 |
| Outcomes | `████████████████████░░░░░` | 20/25 |
| Structured conditions | `██████████` | 10/10 |
| Error binding | `██████████` | 10/10 |
| Field validation | `███████░░░` | 7/10 |
| Relationships | `██████░░░░` | 6/10 |
| Events | `█████` | 5/5 |
| AGI readiness | `████░` | 4/5 |
| Simplicity | `█████` | 5/5 |
